scripts.publish:devtools: bun run --filter=radar-devtools build && cd packages/devtools && npm publish --access public
scripts.lint: bun run --filter=radar-app lint && bun run --filter=radar-devtools lint && bun run --filter=@radar/database lint && bun run --filter=@radar/mcp lint && bun run --filter=@radar/types lint
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter=radar-app typecheck && bun run --filter=radar-devtools typecheck && bun run --filter=@radar/types typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --filter=radar-app test:run && bun run --filter=radar-devtools test:run && bun run --filter=@radar/mcp test:run
